calendar.matters:
PETITION RE SUBSTITUTED JUDGMENT TRUST
Off Calendar Feb-19-2015 Advanced From May-05-15 To Mar-17-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION RE SUBSTITUTED JUDGMENT TRUST
Off Calendar Apr-01-2015 Off Calendar

Petitioners Unopposed Ex Parte Application For The Following Orders: (1) Approval Of Eric Lai As Guardian Ad Litem; (2) Approval Of The Lai Sim Lai Special Needs Trust; (3) Or, Alternatively, An Order Shortening Time On The Hearing For The Lai Sim Lai Special Needs Trust, Pursuant To Local Rule 14.9
Off Calendar Mar-24-2015 Off Calendar

PETITION RE SUBSTITUTED JUDGMENT TRUST
Off Calendar Mar-18-2015 Continued To Apr-01-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Spencer Pahlke for Sim Lai Lai. Stephen Dale (trustee) in Propria Persona.

The court asked if a proof of service (POS) had been filed on the required form. Mr. Pahlke stated that he emailed a POS to the court examiner and provided a copy (not file stamped) to the court, that it leaves out Irene Lai, sister of Eric Lai, that they do not have an address for her, are unable to locate her except when she visits at the hospital but state she knows about the trust. The court stated the issue of the Guardian ad Litem (GAL) and that a GAL would need to be appointed in this case. Mr. Pahlke stated that the settlement is final but based on a determination of good faith (hearing set for 4/21/15), that the settlement will be at least $1,000,000.00, that there are medical liens and that after the liens, fees and expenses the amount is $441,892.00. The court stated that there are other issues to the structure of the trust, that the fees are 1.5% which is more than the standard 1% and that expenses should be included in the 1%. Mr. Dale stated that they are willing to accept whatever the court feels reasonable and that they expect to hold this for only a short amount of time. The court stated that it will continue the matter for counsel to clear up the issue of the GAL, for counsel to decide if this is the best way to proceed, that if the special needs trust is granted they will not be able to invest in mutual funds, that the fee of 1% will be inclusive of the costs of trustee and addressed that counsel should have requested to waive notice to the missing person. The petition re substituted judgment trust was continued to April 1, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

PETITION RE SUBSTITUTED JUDGMENT TRUST
Off Calendar Mar-17-2015 Continued To Mar-18-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petitioners Ex Parte Application For An Order Shortening Time On The Hearing (1) To Approve Petition To Compromise A Disputed Claim Of A Person With A Disability And (2) To Establish A Special Needs Trust
Off Calendar Feb-19-2015 Granted Per Written Order
